sort_by_doc: The internal numeric identifier in the changer dropdown used by dconf for the currently selected sorting option. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.
image_filter_doc: The Search String For The Wallpapers
swaybg_mode_doc: The internal identifier for Swaybg mode.
swaybg_color_doc: The Hex Color For Swaybg Background Fill Must Be Six characters-long
mpvpaper_additional_options_doc: Custom Options For Mpvpaper Passed As Command Line Arguments
awww_transition_step_doc: How Fast The Transition Approaches The New Image Used By awww
awww_transition_duration_doc: How Long The Transition Takes To Complete In Seconds Used by-awww
awww_transition_bezier_p0_doc: Point 0-for The Bezier Curve To Use For The Transition
awww_transition_bezier_p1_doc: Point 1-for The Bezier Curve To Use For The Transition
awww_transition_bezier_p2_doc: Point 2-for The Bezier Curve To Use For The Transition
awww_transition_bezier_p3_doc: Point 3-for The Bezier Curve To Use For The Transition
gslapper_scale_mode_doc: The internal numeric identifier in the changer dropdown used by dconf for the currently selected gslapper scale mode. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.
gslapper_pause_mode_doc: The internal numeric identifier in the changer dropdown used by dconf for the currently selected gslapper pause mode. Do not change unless you know what you are doing.
gslapper_loop_doc: The boolean flag to loop video wallpapers in gslapper used by dconf.
gslapper_additional_options_doc: Custom options for gslapper passed as command line arguments.
theme_doc:
Modifies the appearance of the application. Can be one of the following options:
	    Light
          Dracula
          Nord
          SolarizedLight
          SolarizedDark
          GruvboxLight
          GruvboxDark
          CatppuccinLatte
          CatppuccinFrappe
          CatppuccinMacchiato
          CatppuccinMocha
          TokyoNight
          TokyoNightStorm
          TokyoNightLight
          KanagawaWave
          KanagawaDragon
          KanagawaLotus
          Moonfly
          Nightfly
          Oxocarbon
          Ferra
favorite_images_only_doc: Show favorite images only or all images.
